chain.thought: Explanation: The "natural change per year" first exceeds 100,000 in the 1960-1965 interval, rising from 88,000 (1955-1960) to 105,000.

judge_thought: Explanation: Interpreting “more than 100,000” as referring to the “natural change per year,” the values are 74,000 (1950-1955), 88,000 (1955-1960), and then 105,000 (1960-1965). The first interval exceeding 100,000 is 1960-1965.
